name: IQCDL Practitioner Level
description: 5-day hands-on Practitioner certification for developers, cryptographers and security architects — Qiskit, ML-KEM (Kyber), ML-DSA (Dilithium), SLH-DSA (SPHINCS+) implementation and crypto-agile system design.
teaches: Qiskit programming, ML-KEM / ML-DSA / SLH-DSA implementation, hybrid TLS, crypto-agility, real-world PQC migration patterns.
coursePrerequisites: IQCDL Foundation Level and basic Python.

offers.category: International base price; regional pricing applies (see https://iqcdl.org/pricing)
